holdings.name: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

raw.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.n: The Bank of New York Mellon Corporation

holdings.infoBox: EQWL is an equity ETF with a total of 104 individual holdings. The top holdings are Intel stock at 2.40%, Advanced Micro Devices at 2.30%, Micron Technology at 2.16%, Lam Research at 1.55%, and Applied Materials at 1.49%.

overview.description: The Invesco S&P 100 Equal Weight ETF (EQWL) is an exchange-traded fund that is based on the S&P 100 Equal Weighted index. The fund tracks the an equally-weighted index composed of the 100 largest companies in the US equity markets. EQWL was launched on Dec 1, 2006 and is issued by Invesco.
